uiContractSchema.description: Ajv-validated JSON Schema defining the structure of per-set UI contracts

validateUiContract.signature: validateUiContract(contract: object): { valid: boolean, errors?: AjvError[] }
validateUiContract.description: Validate a UI-CONTRACT.json against the schema using Ajv

checkUiConsistency.signature: checkUiConsistency(cwd: string, milestoneId: string): { consistent: boolean, conflicts: UiConflict[] }
checkUiConsistency.description: Cross-set UI consistency check -- verifies component naming, layout rules, and shared UI patterns

buildUiContext.description: Build UI specification context section for executor agent prompt injection

uiContractCliCommands.signature: rapid-tools ui-contract validate <set> | ui-contract check-consistency | ui-contract show <set>
uiContractCliCommands.description: CLI commands for UI contract management

schemaValidated.description: All UI-CONTRACT.json files must pass Ajv schema validation before being accepted

crossSetConsistency.description: UI consistency check detects conflicting component names, contradictory layout rules, and incompatible design tokens across sets

existingContractUnchanged.description: The existing CONTRACT.json schema and validation pipeline is not modified; UI-CONTRACT.json is a separate, parallel artifact
